# Step 06: Migrate Business Logic
# VB6 Procedures → C# Services with DI and async patterns
# Generated by GitHub Copilot CLI

## Service Interfaces (PrecisionParts.Core/Services/)

| Interface              | Replaces VB6                    | Methods                                    |
|------------------------|---------------------------------|--------------------------------------------|
| IWorkOrderService      | clsWorkOrder.cls + frmWorkOrder | CRUD, status, cost calc, number generation |
| IInventoryService      | clsInventory.cls + frmInventory | CRUD, qty update, low stock, transactions  |
| IPartService           | clsPart.cls + frmPartLookup     | CRUD, search, part number validation       |
| IQualityCheckService   | frmQualityCheck.frm             | CRUD, date range query, auto-hold on fail  |
| IShippingService       | frmShipping.frm                 | CRUD, manifest generation, auto-complete   |

## Service Implementations (PrecisionParts.Infrastructure/Services/)

### WorkOrderService
- Replaces: clsWorkOrder.cls (Load, Save, Delete, Validate, CalculateCost)
- Cost calculation now configurable via CostCalculationSettings (was hardcoded $45/hr, 15% overhead)
- Work order number generation: WO-YYYYMMDD-NNN pattern preserved
- Auto-sets completion date when status → Completed
- Delete blocked if QC or shipping records exist (business rule preserved)

### InventoryService
- Replaces: clsInventory.cls (Load, Save, UpdateQuantity, CheckReorderStatus)
- Stock status logic preserved: Critical/Reorder/Low/OK thresholds
- Transaction logging on every quantity change (audit trail)
- Non-negative inventory enforcement
- Low stock alerts via ILogger (was VB6 MsgBox)

### PartService
- Replaces: clsPart.cls (Load, Save, Delete, ValidatePartNumber)
- Part number validation: prefix 2-4 alpha, hyphen segments, max 20 chars
- Known prefixes: PP, PPM, PPA, MFG, ASM, RAW, HDW, ELC
- Search across part number, description, material
- Duplicate check on create

### QualityCheckService
- Replaces: frmQualityCheck.frm business logic
- Business rule: Fail result auto-sets work order to OnHold
- Date range queries for reporting

### ShippingService
- Replaces: frmShipping.frm business logic
- Business rule: shipping auto-completes the work order
- Manifest number generation: SM-YYYYMMDD-NNN

## Configuration (CostCalculationSettings)
- LaborRatePerHour: $45.00 (was VB6 hardcoded constant)
- HoursPerPart: 0.5 (was VB6 hardcoded constant)
- OverheadPercentage: 0.15 (was VB6 hardcoded 15%)
- Loaded via IOptions<CostCalculationSettings> from appsettings.json

## Database Seeder
- DatabaseSeeder.cs replaces seed_data.sql
- Provides 5 users, 3 customers, 5 parts, 3 materials, 3 work orders
- Passwords are placeholder hashes (no plain-text!)

## Anti-Patterns Resolved
| VB6 Anti-Pattern                    | .NET 9 Solution                     |
|-------------------------------------|--------------------------------------|
| Global ADO connection               | Scoped DbContext via DI              |
| On Error GoTo error handling         | Structured try/catch + ILogger       |
| String-concatenated SQL             | EF Core parameterized queries        |
| Hardcoded business constants        | IOptions<T> from appsettings.json    |
| Mixed UI + data access in classes   | Clean service layer separation       |
| MsgBox for alerts                   | ILogger warnings + UI notifications  |
| DoEvents for responsiveness         | Async/await throughout               |
